{{Quote|Why, sure. It's a General Spacetronics ''MaKing''-class transport.|Roark Garnet|<ref name="RPG" />}}
'''General Spacetronics''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufacturer who produced the [[MaKing-class transport|''MaKing''-class transport]]. They offered licenses to local interests to build some of their craft, such as the "[[Janako]]" model of the ''MaKing''-class.<ref name="RPG" />
